user_query: I'm a travel agent and I'm looking for luxurious hotels in Dubai to recommend to my clients. Can you suggest some high-end accommodations? It would be great if you could provide reviews and ratings as well.

TaskList.description: Query a database or service for a list of luxurious hotels in Dubai.
Retrieve detailed information about each hotel including reviews and ratings.
Compile and format the list of hotels along with their reviews and ratings for presentation.
